articles.author: Angela Yang
articles.title: Tech companies are making their robots cute to try and win over humans - NBC News
articles.description: Whether they’re delivering food or folding your laundry, consumer-facing robots are increasingly being designed to be more palatable to the humans who interact with them.
articles.content:
When the streets of Los Angeles flooded with rain last week, some of the citys residents found themselves feeling sorry for a peculiar object: a food delivery robot floundering in water and debris.
… [+7487 chars]
